Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Due to the influence of Shadows, civilians will sometimes get lost in Tartarus and become {f 0 1 2}missing persons{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Missing persons will be somewhere in Tartarus, and {f 0 1 2}must be rescued within a set time limit{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}In the event someone goes missing, details will be posted on {f 0 1 2}the bulletin board in front of the police station{f 0 1 27}, so keep an eye peeled.[n]{f 1 1}
